request:
Subject: Charged twice for March
I was billed $49 twice on the same day for our Pro plan. Invoice # thrice shows two charges. Please refund the duplicate.

expected_output.summary: Duplicate Pro plan charge; customer requests refund

request: Our company card was declined at renewal and the workspace is now locked. We updated the card in Stripe but still can't open projects.

expected_output.summary: Renewal decline locked workspace despite updated card

request: SSO login via Okta fails with 'invalid_client' after we rotated secrets last night. Half the eng team is locked out.

expected_output.summary: Okta SSO invalid_client after secret rotation; eng locked out

request: I reset my password but the reset email never arrives. Checked spam. Personal Gmail account.

expected_output.summary: Password reset email not delivered to Gmail user

request: Export to CSV truncates rows after 10k. We need the full 42k row report for finance close tomorrow.

expected_output.summary: CSV export truncates after 10k rows before finance close

request: Dark mode flashes white on every page load in Chrome 128 on macOS. Annoying but usable.

expected_output.summary: Dark mode white flash on Chrome 128 macOS page load

request: How do I add a second admin to our workspace without transferring ownership?

expected_output.summary: How to add a second workspace admin without ownership transfer

request: Where is the API rate-limit documentation for the v2 endpoints?

expected_output.summary: Request for v2 API rate-limit documentation location
